program_source_scope: public representative set only; not a full 13k FREIDA dataset
source_notes: NRMP directory is the best starting point for ~6,000+ ACGME-accredited residency programs.
FREIDA total ~13,000 includes fellowships; bulk export is restricted, so full compilation requires program-by-program collection.
Additional columns such as PD/coordinator/contact should come from individual program websites when available.
